content:
I'm a beginner web developer, and I literally just found out about ADA. I'm confused, because, to my understanding so far, it seems like any predatory lawyer could file a claim against any website, and even if its mostly compliant, force you to pay settlement fees since it's cheaper than fighting the claim, or at least pay some lawyer fees. Is this accurate?

  submitted by   /u/Hawexp
[link]   [comments]
